texto: John G. turns on him, hands on hips, hair caked with snow. 'Hey, buddy, let me tell you something. Drugs are the only thing I got. I am a drug addict. That's all I've ever been and that's all I'll ever be. Even if I'm not putting a needle in my arm or pipe in my mouth right this second, the thought is still in my mind.' He taps the side of his head. 'And if I decide I'm gonna get high to deal with the pressures in my life, there's not a fuckin' thing you can do about it.
explicacao: Citação de Peter Blauner sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “John G. turns on him, hands on hips, hair caked with snow. 'Hey, buddy, let me tell you something…” articula reflexao, addiction, thing em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
